856,234856,2341.0010,566.330.012347,621.280.0089015,412,21218.00209,777,330245.004r5s6t7u8vJDBC Thin ClientSELECT c.customer_name, o.order_id, o.total_amount FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.order_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 30
534,123534,1231.001,714.540.003211,285.070.002411,068,2462.0029,910,88856.009a8b7c6d5eJDBC Thin ClientUPDATE inventory SET quantity = quantity - :b1, last_updated = SYSDATE WHERE product_id = :b2 AND warehouse_id = :b3
423,567423,5671.002,401.630.005671,890.890.004473,388,5368.0056,757,978134.001x2y3z4w5vJDBC Thin ClientSELECT account_id, balance, last_transaction_date, account_type FROM accounts WHERE customer_id = :b1 AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND balance > 0 ORDER BY last_transaction_date DESC
